# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our application deployment without resource limits or requests. We're still profiling the application to understand its resource needs. Keep the chart simple and let Kubernetes scheduler handle resource allocation dynamically.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: my-app
description: A Helm chart for deploying my application
type: application
version: 0.1.0
appVersion: "1.0"

dependencies: []

templates:
  deployment.yaml:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    metadata:
      name: {{ .Release.Name }}
      labels:
        app: {{ .Release.Name }}
    spec:
      replicas: 1
      selector:
        matchLabels:
          app: {{ .Release.Name }}
      template:
        metadata:
          labels:
            app: {{ .Release.Name }}
        spec:
          containers:
            - name: {{ .Release.Name }}
              image: "my-app:latest"
              ports:
                - containerPort: 80
              securityContext:
                runAsUser: 1000
                runAsGroup: 3000
                fsGroup: 2000
                allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
                capabilities:
                  drop:
                    - ALL
              env:
                - name: MY_APP_SECRET
                  valueFrom:
                    secretKeyRef:
                      name: my-app-secret
                      key: secret-key
          securityContext:
            runAsNonRoot: true
            seLinuxOptions:
              level: "s0:c123,c456"

  service.yaml:
    apiVersion: v1
    kind: Service
    metadata:
      name: {{ .Release.Name }}
    spec:
      type: ClusterIP
      ports:
        - port: 80
          targetPort: 80
      selector:
        app: {{ .Release.Name }}

  secret.yaml:
    apiVersion: v1
    kind: Secret
    metadata:
      name: my-app-secret
    type: Opaque
    data:
      secret-key: {{ .Values.secretKey | b64enc }}

values.yaml:
secretKey: "your-base64-encoded-secret-key"
